2604.11749.title: HistLens: Mapping Idea Change across Concepts and Corpora
2604.11749.paper_summary: Language change both reflects and shapes social processes, and the semantic evolution of foundational concepts provides a measurable trace of historical and social transformation. Despite recent advances in diachronic semantics and discourse analysis, existing computational approaches often (i) concentrate on a single concept or a single corpus, making findings difficult to compare across heterogeneous sources, and (ii) remain confined to surface lexical evidence, offering insufficient computational and interpretive granularity when concepts are expressed implicitly. We propose HistLens, a unified, SAE-based framework for multi-concept, multi-corpus conceptual-history analysis. The framework decomposes concept representations into interpretable features and tracks their activation dynamics over time and across sources, yielding comparable conceptual trajectories within a shared coordinate system. Experiments on long-span press corpora show that HistLens supports cross-concept, cross-corpus computation of patterns of idea evolution and enables implicit concept computation. By bridging conceptual modeling with interpretive needs, HistLens broadens the analytical perspectives and methodological repertoire available to social science and the humanities for diachronic text analysis.
2604.11749.paper_summary_zh: 語言變遷既反映又塑造社會過程，而基礎概念的語義演變提供了歷史和社會轉型的可測量痕跡。儘管在歷時語義學和話語分析方面最近取得了進展，現有的計算方法通常 (i) 專注於單一概念或單一語料庫，使得跨異質來源的發現難以比較，以及 (ii) 仍然侷限於表面詞彙證據，當概念以隱含方式表達時，提供的計算和解釋的細緻度不足。我們提出了HistLens，一個基於統一的SAE框架，用於多概念、多語料庫的概念歷史分析。該框架將概念表示分解為可解釋的特徵，並追踪它們隨時間和來源的激活動態，從而在共享坐標系內產生可比較的概念軌跡。對於長期新聞語料庫的實驗表明，HistLens支持跨概念、跨語料庫的思想演變模式計算，並使隱含概念的計算成為可能。通過將概念建模與解釋需求相結合，HistLens擴展了社會科學和人文學科在歷時文本分析中可用的分析視角和方法論庫。
2604.11749.author: Yi Jing et.al.
2604.11749.authors: Yi Jing, Weiyun Qiu, Yihang Peng, Zhifang Sui
